items.name: Phone
items.description: Suzy's mother is the first number on the contacts list.

items.name: Wood Stove
items.description: This item functions as a crafting station, fixed at the Home location. Useful for producing items from recipes, namely, Cooked Bacon — go ahead and click on it.

items.name: Cooked Bacon
items.description: "0 / 20" means that although there are none yet, we can have up to 20 at a time. Looks like crafting requires Raw Bacon, but we do not start with any in stock. Where could that be found? Keep an eye out for possible sources as you investigate and travel. We'll also need the Wood Stove to cook the bacon, which means Suzy will need to be at home to do so. Notice that the Where column for the wood stove shows Home, indicating that it's currently available.

items.name: Barn
items.description: A crafting station, similar to the Wood Stove.

items.name: Pigs
items.description: The most efficient plan would be to raise more pigs after butchering only 2 of them, by pressing Start on the row where pigs are the Source (as well as the result). However, let's do it the hard way this time. Go to Raw Bacon and slaughter all of them! After you've dispatched the original herd, it's time to get some cash to buy more. Click on Cash and then Chores to continue. When you've bought a new pair of pigs, reload the page to be able to raise more. Then, finish the stack of Raw Bacon, leaving at least a pair left.

items.name: Chores
items.description: In this scenario, Chores and Cash are general storage items (or universal), meaning that they can be used anywhere and don't have to be carried by a specific person. Press Start to do some chores. There's no limit to the chores that can be done, but you can only get paid for 10 at a time. Go to Cash to get your earnings.

items.name: Cash
items.description: Getting paid doesn't take any particular amount of time, so there's a Gain button instead of Start, but otherwise, it works the same. To get paid all at once, enter a higher number such as 11 — it won't do more than what you have available. If you don't have enough cash to buy a pig yet, go back to Chores and repeat this process. Also, of course, you'll need more than one pig in order to get baby pigs.

items.name: Raw Bacon
items.description: Now we can make use of that Knife Suzy has been carrying. There are 4 pigs currently at the farm. Press Start and wait while she turns them into neatly sized pieces of meat. If Suzy is not shown under Where as carrying the knife, you may need to go back to her screen and click on the knife to get to this raw bacon screen. Similarly, if the pigs are at the farm but not shown, navigate back to the farm and then click through the pigs to get here. Looks like we ran out. Go back to Pigs and see how to get more. Once you have a full load of raw bacon (20), it's time for Suzy to start the perilous trip back home. Navigate to her page to do so.

locations.name: Home
locations.description: First, take a look around. Click on her Mom and then Suzy to see that both have Pathfinding, but Suzy's is lower. This means she'll be more likely to get lost or have other trouble in events that may happen in the woods if her Mom isn't there. Also, right-click on the Wood Stove to open it in a new tab. After finishing those instructions, close the tab to return to this page. Next, it's time to explore. The only destination we can get to from home shows Somewhere not yet visited, meaning we don't know anything about it yet. Bring up Suzy's page again to travel.

locations.name: Sketchy-Path Forest
locations.description: The notable thing about this forest is the Travel Danger event. There is a chance of automatically triggering while characters travel in this area. Since there is no delay on the way to Uncle's Farm, the event will not trigger yet. Go ahead and bring Suzy to the farm if you haven't done so. Then continue with the instructions described under Uncle's Farm.

locations.name: Uncle's Farm
locations.description: Hopefully, you immediately recognized that Pigs mean bacon, which is what we're after. Click on them to continue.

characters.name: Uncle
characters.description: Will pay a modest salary for chores.

characters.name: Mom
characters.description: An NPC. You can still control her actions, though, if she is needed in the woods later to rescue Suzy. After viewing this character the first time, press the key shown in brackets [ ] to return to Home. For mobile users, just tap on Home.

characters.name: Suzy
characters.description: This is your player character for the scenario. Under Player in the upper right hand corner, Change User ID to "Playing as Suzy". Then return Home. Once you're finished at Home and are ready to travel, take a look at the possible destinations to travel to. It looks like there's only one, initially listed as a location not yet visited, so select it and press Go. On arrival, the location's name is revealed, linked. Click on Sketchy-Path Forest for further instructions. * * * * * If you've finished getting bacon, then it's time to go back. Getting to the forest won't be a problem, but leaving it will be. In case the event doesn't pop up (5% chance), we'll still say it happened, so make sure Suzy is in the forest and click on Travel Danger. Continue by following instructions for that event.

attribs.name: Pays for Odd Jobs
attribs.description: Has money to pay for chores.

overall settings.title: Bacon for Dinner – Walkthrough
overall settings.description: After trying the first scenario, consider going through this guided tour to learn more about how the game works. Same story but with detailed instructions and explanations, in lieu of a help section. Begin by clicking on the Home location and following the instructions.
